text: Fill in the blanks about nervous tissue histology
questions: Multipolar neurons have a large polygonal *soma/cell body* with abundant *Nissl/Nissl substance* bodies in the cytoplasm, representing rough endoplasmic reticulum.
In the PNS, myelin is produced by *Schwann/Schwann cells* cells, while in the CNS it is produced by *oligodendrocytes/oligodendroglia*.
A peripheral nerve is surrounded by *epineurium/epineurial* sheath externally; each fascicle within it is wrapped by *perineurium/perineurial* sheath.
In Guillain-Barre syndrome, autoimmune *demyelination/demyelinating* of peripheral nerves causes prolonged distal motor *latencies/latency* on nerve conduction studies.
